project.name: TensorRT-LLM Native — Linux x86_64
project.description:
Native libraries (.so) for TensorRT-LLM on Linux x86_64.
Contains: - libjniTRTLLM.so (JNI bridge, generated by JavaCPP) - libtensorrt_llm.so (TensorRT-LLM core library) - libnvinfer.so (TensorRT runtime) - libnvinfer_plugin.so (TensorRT plugins)
These libraries are loaded automatically by JavaCPP at runtime.
To populate this module with actual .so files: 1. Build TensorRT-LLM on a Linux x86_64 machine with CUDA 2. Run: mvn -pl trtllm-bridge org.bytedeco:javacpp:build 3. Copy the generated .so files to: src/main/resources/org/bytedeco/tensorrt_llm/linux-x86_64/
